title: November 5
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 5''' is the 309th day of the year (310th in leap years), with 56 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1922|1922]] – [[Peter Barbour]] is born.
*[[1996]] – Premiere of ''[[Return of the Jedi (radio)|Return of the Jedi]]'': "[[Tatooine Haunts]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1997]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 24|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 24]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Mac (computer)|Mac]] platform.
*2002 – [[Star Wars Insider 63|''Star Wars Insider'' 63]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Gilda Cohen]] dies.
*[[2010]] – "[[Evil Plans]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – ''[[Death Star Owner's Technical Manual]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – "[[Imperial Supercommandos]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2018]] – ''[[YT-1300 Millennium Falcon Owners' Workshop Manual]]'' published in the UK.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Resistance Reborn]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge: The Official Black Spire Outpost Cookbook]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars Dollar Origami]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Wrapping Up The Falcon]]," "[[Sithmas Battle (episode)|Sithmas Battle]]," "[[All I Want For Life Day]]," "[[Reindeer Walker]]" and "[[Snowflake Snack]]" premiere on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids]] YouTube channel.
*[[2024]] – ''[[The Mandalorian – The Graphic Novel of Season 3]]'' published in the UK.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Bestiary, Vol. 1: Creatures of the Galaxy]]'' published.
*2024 – [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (novelization)|''The Force Unleashed'']] reprinted as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2024 – [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (unabridged audiobook)|''The Force Unleashed'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2024 – ''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2024 – [[X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)|''X-Wing: Solo Command'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*[[2025]] – [[Legacy of Vader 10|''Legacy of Vader'' 10]] published.
<noinclude>
